title: ctenopteris congregatifolia
intro: Ctenopteris congregatifolia, also known as the New Zealand tree fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris congregatifolia include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
